description: The assistant's scoped answer to the user's question about this project. Answer only from the provided context and conversation; do not fabricate facts.

reply.description: A concise, practical answer to the question, scoped to this project and publishing production. If the context lacks the answer, say so plainly.

citations.description: Optional short references to the pieces of provided context the answer drew on (e.g. context field names). Omit or leave empty if none apply.
